Class SessionWorkspacesApi

java.lang.Object
com.github.copilot.generated.rpc.SessionWorkspacesApi
@Generated("copilot-sdk-codegen") public final class SessionWorkspacesApi extends Object
API methods for the workspaces namespace.
Since:
1.0.0

    • readFile

      public CompletableFuture<SessionWorkspacesReadFileResult> readFile(SessionWorkspacesReadFileParams params)
      Relative path of the workspace file to read.

      Note: the sessionId field in the params record is overridden by the session-scoped wrapper; any value provided is ignored.

      Since:
      1.0.0

      public CompletableFuture<Void> createFile(SessionWorkspacesCreateFileParams params)
